case_title: COMBS & GREENLEY/LEGALINK, INC. VS BARTLETT & LEADER-PICONE, LLP

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27265, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,215.00 FILED BY COMBS & GREENLEY/LEGALINK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARTLETT & LEADER-PICONE, LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMBS & GREENLEY/LEGALINK, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARTLETT & LEADER-PICONE, LLP APPEAL DISMISSED, CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF. SCA 27265 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMBS & GREENLEY/LEGALINK, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARTLETT & LEADER-PICONE, LLP $2,253.50 PRINCIPAL, $151.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,405.00, DEFENDANT'S NAME CHANGE TO BARTLETT AND LEADER-PICONE, LLP.
